improvements.improvement: Prompt should explicitly require rollback behavior for promotion workflows whenever post-deploy validation fails.
Prompt should require retry/backoff + timeout handling for all HTTP smoke checks and explicit handling of transport-level curl failures under set -e.
Prompt should require workflow_dispatch inputs to match enforced runtime constraints so users cannot select unsupported combinations.
Prompt should require validating both source and target slot running state before swap operations.
Prompt should require workflow concurrency controls for deploy/promote jobs and SHA-pinning of third-party actions.
